item.title: Tour Montparnasse Is One of Paris’s Uglier Landmarks. It’s Getting a Makeover.
item.description: The Tour Montparnasse is one of Paris’s least-loved landmarks. After half a century, it’s finally being remodeled.

item.title: Mexican Forces Kill ‘El Mencho,’ Nation’s Most-Wanted Cartel Boss
item.description: “El Mencho” was the longtime head of one of the nation’s most powerful cartels. Armed groups set fire to cars and buildings across Mexico in the wake ...

item.title: Drug Lord ‘El Mencho’ Was Killed in Mexico. What’s Next for the Cartel He Led?
item.description: The death of Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes dealt a major blow to the Jalisco New Generation Cartel, but few believe it spells the end for the powerful gr...

item.title: This Exercise Research Tells Us Nothing
item.description: We will probably never get good data to answer the question of which exercise routine is best.

item.title: The Human Cost of the Trump Administration’s War on Science
item.description: The ripple effects of cutting H.I.V. research funding.
